positive: Minimalist circular emblem design featuring a stylized, symmetrical arrangement of forest animals (deer, fox, owl, bear) silhouetted against a clean, contrasting background. The overall composition should evoke a natural, whimsical, yet sophisticated feel, perfect for a patch or t-shirt print. Use deep emerald green and burnt orange accents, with the main silhouettes being solid black. Strong, clean lines, bold contrast, perfect central framing, highly decorative, vector illustration style, high detail, flat graphic design, clean edges, suitable for screen printing.
negative: blurry, low detail, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, busy background, photorealistic, grunge, grain, dirty, bad anatomy, excess elements, asymmetrical, messy
